rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE RITA T. YEARWOOD REV. LIVING TR DATE 11/1/1999 TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Respondents Motion For Summary Judgment
rulings.Rulings: The motion for summary judgment is denied. The declaration of Dr. Aazaz Haq is sufficient to raise a triable issue of material fact as to Ms. Yearwood's testamentary capacity at the times she signed her 1999 and 1996 wills. Any party wishing to contest this tentative ruling by appearing at the scheduled hearing must so advise other parties and the courtroom clerk (415-551-3702) no later than 4:00 p.m. Wednesday, December 13, 2017. The prevailing party must submit a proposed order consistent with this tentative ruling and compliant with section 437c(g) of the Code of Civil Procedure.
